caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recorded in a studio with a dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam background. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone held by a boom arm, which features the legible text "Rode NT1-A". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins by looking toward the microphone and raising his left hand in a blurring motion. As the sequence progresses, his expression shifts from a neutral speaking pose to one of surprise, with his eyes widening and his mouth slightly open. His head shifts slightly, and his gaze moves toward something off-camera to his right. The equipment and background remain static while the man's facial expressions and hand movements convey a sense of reaction.
